item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 59s Liam Rosenior: “To lose this game in the manner we did is extremely disappointing
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 59s Liam Rosenior: “To lose this game in the manner we did is extremely disappointing because we had opportunities to win”. 179 82 691 8 mil

item.title: footballontnt: Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 1min "I can only say what I saw. I felt we were the dominant team from minute on
item.description:
Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 1min "I can only say what I saw. I felt we were the dominant team from minute one to the end of the game."
Liam Rosenior offers his assessment of Chelsea's 1-0 home defeat to Manchester Utd.
@julesbreach
TNT Sports and HBO Max 5 3 8 1 mil

item.title: lauriewhitwell: Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 1min Kobbie Mainoo excelled five days on from being ruled out v Leeds through injury.
item.description:
Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 1min Kobbie Mainoo excelled five days on from being ruled out v Leeds through injury.
He toiled to get fit in time for Chelsea. Kept taking ball in tight areas + trusting his control. Always looked to play forward. Took a whack in back from Liam Delap but stayed on. #MUFC 1 12 94 1 mil

Manchester City @ManCity · 1min "He has been massively, massively important"
@PepTeam on the impact made by @BernardoCSilva during his time as a Blue! 15 11 90 1 mil
